message:
🐛 Fix i18n pluralization and compliance test logic (#1157)

Address Copilot review feedback from PRs #1155 and #1156:
- ClusterChangelog: translate all relative time branches (m/h/d ago)
- Use i18next _one/_other plural forms instead of parenthetical
  pluralization for groupCount, matchCount, nClusters, nServices,
  nGateways, nConnections, nEndpoints, nClustersScope, nClustersSelected
- Fix always-false condition in i18n compliance test (dotKeyPattern
  match AND no dots is contradictory)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
